Interface Persistence.SchemaManagementProperties

All Known Implementing Classes:
PersistenceConfiguration
Enclosing class:
Persistence
public static interface Persistence.SchemaManagementProperties
Properties used to control the schema management tooling.
Since:
4.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_CONNECTION
    Supplies a JDBC Connection to use for executing schema management actions on the database.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SCHEMAS
    Specifies whether the persistence provider creates database schemas in addition to creating database objects such as tables, sequences, constraints, and so on.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SCRIPT_SOURCE
    An application-provided SQL script to be executed when the schema is created.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SOURCE
    The source of artifacts to be created.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_TARGET
    The provider-generated SQL script which creates the schema when "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.scripts.action" is set.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_DATABASE_ACTION
    The action to be performed against the database.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_DROP_SCRIPT_SOURCE
    An application-provided SQL script to be executed when the schema is dropped.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_DROP_SOURCE
    The source of artifacts to be dropped.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_DROP_TARGET
    The provider-generated SQL script which drops the schema when "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.scripts.action" is set.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_LOAD_SCRIPT_SOURCE
    An application-provided SQL script to be executed after the schema is created, typically used for loading data.
    static final String
    SCHEMAGEN_SCRIPTS_ACTION
    The action to be generated as a SQL script.

  • Field Details

    • SCHEMAGEN_DATABASE_ACTION

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_DATABASE_ACTION
      The action to be performed against the database.

      Standard actions are: none, create, drop, drop-and-create, validate, populate.

      See Also:
      • SchemaManagementAction
      • PersistenceConfiguration.schemaManagementDatabaseAction(SchemaManagementAction)
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_SCRIPTS_ACTION

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_SCRIPTS_ACTION
      The action to be generated as a SQL script.

      The script is generated in the location specified by "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.scripts.create-target" or "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.scripts.drop-target".

      Standard actions are: none, create, drop, drop-and-create.

      See Also:
      • SchemaManagementAction
      • PersistenceConfiguration.schemaManagementScriptsAction(SchemaManagementAction)
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SOURCE

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SOURCE
      The source of artifacts to be created.

      Standard sources are: metadata, script, metadata-then-script, script-then-metadata.

      The location of the script source is specified by "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.create-script-source".

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_DROP_SOURCE

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_DROP_SOURCE
      The source of artifacts to be dropped.

      Standard sources are: metadata, script, metadata-then-script, script-then-metadata.

      The location of the script source is specified by "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.drop-script-source".

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SCRIPT_SOURCE

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SCRIPT_SOURCE
      An application-provided SQL script to be executed when the schema is created.

      An instance of Reader or a string specifying the file URL of the DDL script.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_DROP_SCRIPT_SOURCE

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_DROP_SCRIPT_SOURCE
      An application-provided SQL script to be executed when the schema is dropped.

      An instance of Reader or a string specifying the file URL of the DDL script.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_LOAD_SCRIPT_SOURCE

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_LOAD_SCRIPT_SOURCE
      An application-provided SQL script to be executed after the schema is created, typically used for loading data.

      An instance of Reader or a string specifying the file URL of the DML script.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_TARGET

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_TARGET
      The provider-generated SQL script which creates the schema when "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.scripts.action" is set.

      An instance of Writer or a string specifying the file URL of the DDL script.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_DROP_TARGET

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_DROP_TARGET
      The provider-generated SQL script which drops the schema when "jakarta.persistence.schema-generation.scripts.action" is set.

      An instance of Writer or a string specifying the file URL of the DDL script.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SCHEMAS

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_CREATE_SCHEMAS
      Specifies whether the persistence provider creates database schemas in addition to creating database objects such as tables, sequences, constraints, and so on. The value true specifies that the persistence provider creates schemas in the database or generates DDL containing CREATE SCHEMA commands.

      If this property is not supplied, the provider does not create database schemas.

      Since:
      4.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SCHEMAGEN_CONNECTION

      static final String SCHEMAGEN_CONNECTION
      Supplies a JDBC Connection to use for executing schema management actions on the database. If not specified, the persistence provider uses the DataSource configured for use by the persistence unit to obtain a JDBC connection.
      Since:
      4.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
